title: Piper Sandler's Top Internet Stock Picks for Current Market Headwinds
text: Headwinds within the market are particularly strong right now. Geopolitical tensions, Chinese lockdowns, and upcoming interest rate hikes are just a few examples of what investors are facing at the moment.

title: GoDaddy: A $100+ Stock
text: GoDaddy is a cash flow generator with growing related metrics (e.g., cash flow, profits). The company's downward stressors are its high amounts of debt and frequent security issues, but neither trump the fact that a DCF valuation puts the stock at above $100.

title: GoDaddy Brings Klarna's BNPL Option to the Domain Aftermarket
text: Internet domain registrar GoDaddy has partnered with Swedish buy now, pay later (BNPL) company Klarna to make purchases from the domain aftermarket more accessible, the company announced recently. The aftermarket is a place for entrepreneurs to purchase domain names, including high-value ones, through registered bids or a negotiated price.

title: Here's Why GoDaddy (GDDY) is a Strong Momentum Stock
text: The Zacks Style Scores offers investors a way to easily find top-rated stocks based on their investing style. Here's why you should take advantage.
